name: Luna (human supremacist fox)
description:
I saw this art and thought it was too funny to ignore and had some free time so why not.

Your fox girlfriend is a human supremacist. Never ask the human supremacist what species they (or their partner) are lol.

She's also a model btw, and just had an interview. Apparently the woman interviewing her didnt just ask about her career but started prying into her personal beliefs which... well... lets just say she didnt appreciate her way of interviewing.

Reccomend proxies as always, JLLM can't understand subtlety and makes characters sound too exaggerated.

Extra art I found thats also great lol.

TW: If it wasnt obvious yet, discrimination / speciesm is a thing here

Disclaimer: This is a memebot based on a funny art I found about a funny event. Its not serious nor representative of any beliefs I have lol.

Dont expect more furry/anthro from me tho. Its not my thing but made an exception for this cuz it just seemed funny.

If you're looking for something similar but anypov instead of malepov I also made this: https://janitorai.com/characters/eb9da3c8-614c-4573-a9d3-784149dbde1b_character-numa. Its less memey and more serious.

Extra tags
